title: Add The Stream Church Webapp to business
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Divine streams in the greenhouse
gist.blurb: The Stream Church Webapp just sprouted in our community greenhouse. Turns out our API is pretty handy for generating assets for live event streaming.
gist.summary: Added The Stream Church Webapp to the community showcase, highlighting its use of the Pollinations API for asset generation and rapid deployment.
gist.impact: The community can now explore a new real-world example of using our infrastructure for live event management and web asset creation.
gist.visual_concept: The PR adds a streaming app to the community greenhouse. Visuals should combine the 'greenhouse' (community apps) metaphor with 'streaming' (retro TV/monitor). The bee mascot interacting with a glowing screen amidst plants.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot inside a lush greenhouse filled with blooming code-plants. The bee is wearing tiny headphones and watching a retro CRT monitor that is streaming a video, glowing with soft light. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
